round1: Round 1 is wrapped, and for some of you, it was uglier than a power play goal against. Stephanie, a valiant effort at predicting every wrong outcome, managed a measly 3 points. But while the rest of you mostly fumbled the Western Conference, Glenda decided to show up, cruising to 13 points with an impressive five exact game calls. Good luck to the rest of you trying to catch that.
round2: Round 2 was a brutal reality check, separating Sophie from the rest of you who clearly have no business picking playoff teams; Glenda and Nickall especially, scraping by with a measly single point. Apparently, picking Toronto to advance past the second round remains a fantasy for the majority.
round3: Round 3 was a quick one, with Florida and Edmonton both wrapping things up in 5. Glenda was the only one with eyes on both prizes, while the five of you who picked Carolina, and Sophie who picked Dallas, might want to check if your teams are still playing.
round4: Round 4 is done. Turns out, only Glenda had the foresight to pick Florida, proving everyone else's Oilers predictions were about as accurate as a puck in the stands. Not a single soul nailed the Panthers in 6, so congratulations on being collectively wrong.
overall: Well, folks, the 2025 NHL Playoffs are officially in the books, and for the second year running, Glenda has cemented her reign as the undisputed pool champion, racking up an impressive 66 points thanks to that brilliant Florida Panthers pick. Her clairvoyant picks and overall dominant performance left the rest of you scrambling for scraps. On the other end of the spectrum, Nickall once again proved that some things never change, gracefully accepting their fourth last-place finish with a pathetic 16 points, tying their own all-time low – a true masterclass in consistent failure over 17 years. While Jake somehow stumbled into a surprising second place after a string of basement finishes, and Benedict continued his tradition of always being the bridesmaid, most of the usual contenders like Marc and Nathan spent the playoffs proving that past glory means absolutely nothing. Seriously, Robin, one correct game pick? Just stick to watching for the commercials next year.
